/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -O3 -DNDEBUG --generate-code=arch=compute_89,code=[compute_89,sm_89] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/bench_grouped_gemm.dir/bench/benchmark_grouped_gemm.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/bench_grouped_gemm.dir/cmake_device_link.o  libgrouped_gemm.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
